query:
SELECT mao.id, mao.name, mao.price_extra, mag.name as group_name 
FROM menu_addon_options mao 
JOIN menu_addon_groups mag ON mao.group_id = mag.id 
WHERE mag.name LIKE '%Turbine%' OR mag.name LIKE '%turbine%' OR mag.name LIKE '%adicional%' OR mag.name LIKE '%Adicional%'
ORDER BY mag.name, mao.name;
